center.name: 墨西哥国立自治大学
center.summary: 墨西哥国立自治大学是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The decline in population size has been recorded in almost all of its natural habitat locations. Based on a collection of data and resident accounts, Amazona finschi population range has decreased by 20% due to habitat loss. An increasingly growing population of approximately 100 individuals is found in Southern California, especially in the San Gabriel Valley and Orange Country. {{cite journal |last = Garret |first = Kimball L
